security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://unpkg.com; style-src-elem 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://unpkg.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://unpkg.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://unpkg.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Claude AI usage in your taskbar
bundle.longDescription: Tray app that monitors Claude AI usage and shows it as progress rings in the system tray.
